messages.content:
اريد كتابة تقرير بالانجليزي .
ارسله للمدير العام 
بخصوص مورد الكوشه الخاصة بخفلات الزفاف   شركة ميراج المتعاقده مع الفندق لتركيب الكوش  
المسؤل عنها السيد عادل 
اليوم لدينا حفل زفاف 
وحسب العقد بين الفندق والضيف  لابد أن  يستلم القاعه جاهزة الساعه السادسه مساء
لاكن مورد الكوشه جاء متأخر 
مع اننا اتصلت عليه بعد الظهر أكثر من مره وكذالك طلبت من السيد بدري ان  يتصل عليه
ولاكن جاء متأخر وكان بطئ جدا في التركيب 
وطلبت منه كثيرا ان ينجز العمل بسرعه ولاكنه لم يستمع. 
والضيف أكثر من مره يتحدث مع متي  سيستلمو  القاعه

ولاكن السيد عادل مورد الكوشه لم يتفهم هذا وعندما اللحينا عليه ان ينجز العمل بسرعه لان الضيف بداء ينزعج بداء يرد علي بطريقة سيئة جدا
ويقول لي أنني ليس لي كلام معه  وهذا كان اما الضيف 
وبسبب هذا التصرف الغير مسؤل جعل الضيف  يتعصب جدا 
وبسبب تأخير مورد الكوشه في التركيب 
 تأخرنا في تسليم القاعه للضيف ٣ سعات 
لانه انتهي من التركيب الساعه ٩ مساء
 
 وبسبب اسلوبه هذا وعدم تحمله المسؤليه تسبب الي ان الضيف يغضب كثيرا وبد برفع صوته وهدته  بتقديم شكوي عليه في وزارة التجاره

Subject: Delay in the Installation of Wedding Canopy for Tonight's Wedding Reception

Dear General Manager,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to bring to your attention an issue we have encountered with the canopy supplier, Mirage, who is contracted with our hotel for the installation of wedding canopies. Mr. Adel is the responsible person from Mirage in charge of this matter.

Today, we have a wedding reception scheduled, and according to the agreement between the hotel and the guest, the ballroom needs to be ready by 6:00 PM. However, the canopy supplier arrived late, despite my numerous calls in the afternoon to remind them of the deadline. I also asked Mr. Bader to contact them early, but they still arrived late and were very slow in the installation process.

I pleaded with them several times to expedite the work, but they did not pay attention to my requests. The guest repeatedly inquired about the estimated time of completion, and I communicated their concerns to Mr. Adel. Unfortunately, he did not understand the urgency of the situation and responded in a very rude manner. He told me that I have no authority to speak with him, which further upset the guest.

Due to this irresponsible behavior, the guest became extremely angry. As a result, they raised their voice and threatened to file a complaint against Mr. Adel with the Ministry of Commerce. Moreover, due to the delay caused by the late installation, we were unable to hand over the ballroom to the guest until 9:00 PM, which caused a delay of three hours.

I believe Mr. Adel's unprofessional conduct and failure to take responsibility for his actions have contributed to the guest's dissatisfaction and frustration. It is crucial that such incidents do not happen in the future as they affect our reputation and customer satisfaction.

I kindly request that you address this matter and take appropriate action to prevent any similar incidents from occurring again. I appreciate your attention to this matter and remain at your disposal for any further information.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Contact Information]
كان ردة علي صادم للغايه  قال انه ليس لي اي صلاحيه للتحدث معه وان اطلب منه انجاز العمل بسرعه  اريد كتابتها بالانجليزي
His response was extremely shocking. He said that I have no authority to speak with him and that I shouldn't ask him to expedite the work.
وانه لم يقوم بانجاز العمل كما طلب منه الضيف لان  الضيف تاخر  كثير وبداء الزوار بالحضور  فطلب منه الخروج خارج القاعه  اريد كتابتها بالانجليزي
He did not complete the work as requested by the guest because the guest was heavily delayed, and visitors began to arrive. Therefore, the guest requested him to leave the premises.
ولم يقوم بانجاز  العمل كما هو متفق عليه مع الضيف.  ولذلك طلب منه الضيف مغادرة قاعة الاحتفالات لأنه  تأخر كثيراً وبدأ الزوار بالتوافد. اريد كتابتها بالانجليزي
He did not complete the work as agreed upon with the guest. Consequently, the guest requested him to leave the event hall as he had delayed significantly, and the visitors had started arriving.
ومع ذالك لم يقوم بانجاز العمل كما هو متفق عليه مع الضيف. ولذلك طلب منه الضيف مغادرة قاعة الاحتفالات لأنه تأخر كثيراً وبدأ الزوار بالتوافد. اريد كتابتها بالانجليزي

Despite that, he did not complete the work as agreed upon with the guest. As a result, the guest requested him to leave the event hall because of his significant delay, and the visitors had started arriving.
ومع ذالك لم يقوم بانجاز العمل كما هو متفق عليه مع الضيف. ولذلك طلب منه الضيف مغادرة قاعة الاحتفالات لأنه تأخر كثيراً .لأن الزوار بدؤ بالتوافد. اريد كتابتها بالانجليزي

Despite that, he did not complete the work as agreed upon with the guest. As a result, the guest requested him to leave the event hall because he had significantly delayed. The visitors had started arriving.

Hi Mohammed,

Please proceed with booking the venue.

Also, kindly let me know about the requirements for the company payment option.

Many thanks,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
اريد الرد علي هذا الاميل  بان يقومو بتوقيع  عرض السعر   وملئ credit-card-payment-authorization

Hi Maryam,

Thank you for your email. I have proceeded with booking the venue as requested. Regarding the payment option, please find attached the quotation for your review and approval. Once you have reviewed the quotation, kindly fill out the credit card payment authorization form and send it back to us.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to let me know.

Thank you, 
Mohammed

اريد صياغة هذا صياغه جيدة                                                                                                                                                                                                      Hi Maryam,

Thank you for your email. I have proceeded with booking the venue as requested please find attached the quotation for your review and approval. . Once you have reviewed the quotation, kindly fill out the credit card payment authorization form and send it back to us.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to let me know.

Hello Maryam,

Thank you for your email. I want to confirm that I have successfully booked the venue as per your request. Attached to this email, you will find the quotation for your review and approval. Please take the time to go through it thoroughly.

Once you have reviewed the quotation and are ready to proceed, we kindly ask you to complete the credit card payment authorization form. This will enable us to process the payment smoothly and securely. Please fill in all the required information and send the completed form back to us at your earliest convenience.

Should you have any questions or need any further assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out. We are here to help.

Thank you again for choosing our services.

Best regards,
Mohammed

الرجاء التوقع علي عرض السعر الذي ارسل اليكم  نرجو منك إكمال نموذج تفويض الدفع ببطاقة الائتمان. وهذا سيمكننا من معالجة الدفع بسلاسة وأمان. يرجى ملء جميع المعلومات المطلوبة وإرسال النموذج المكتمل إلينا في أقرب وقت ممكن.

إذا كانت لديك أي أسئلة أو كنت بحاجة إلى أي مساعدة إضافية، فلا تتردد في التواصل معنا. نحن هنا للمساعدة.

Please kindly sign the attached quotation that was sent to you. We kindly request that you complete the credit card payment authorization form. This will enable us to process the payment smoothly and securely. Please fill in all the required information and send the completed form back to us as soon as possible.

If you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are here to help.
قبل بدايه الجتماع  كتابتها بالانجليزي

Prior to the start of the meeting, please ensure the following:

- All attendees have joined the virtual meeting platform.
- Microphones are muted upon entry, unless speaking.
- Cameras are turned on, if possible, to facilitate better communication.
- Any necessary presentation materials or documents are shared with participants ahead of time.
- The agenda and objectives of the meeting are clearly defined and shared with all attendees.
- Any technical issues or concerns are resolved before the meeting begins.

Thank you for your attention to these details. We look forward to a productive meeting.
الارسالها قبل موعد بدايه الاجتماع اريد كتابتها بالانجليزي

Dear Team,

Just a friendly reminder that we have a meeting scheduled to begin in [insert time] today. Please make sure to:

1. Join the virtual meeting platform on time.
2. Confirm your microphone is muted upon entry, unless you are speaking.
3. Turn on your camera if possible for better communication.
4. Review any presentation materials or documents shared prior to the meeting.
5. Familiarize yourself with the agenda and objectives of the meeting.
6. Resolve any technical issues or concerns before the start time.

If you have any questions or need assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you for your cooperation, and I look forward to a productive meeting.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
اريد كتابتها بالانجليزي فى موعد اقصاه يوم الاتحد القادم

Dear Team,

I would like to inform you that we have an upcoming meeting scheduled for [date] at [time]. As the meeting facilitator, I kindly ask that you take note of the following reminders prior to the meeting:

1. Ensure that you have received the meeting invitation and have it saved in your calendar.
2. Double-check your availability and make any necessary adjustments to ensure your attendance.
3. Familiarize yourself with the meeting agenda and any accompanying materials that have been shared.
4. Prepare any questions, updates, or contributions you may have regarding the meeting topic.
5. Join the virtual meeting platform promptly at the scheduled meeting time.
6. Make sure your microphone is muted upon entry and only unmute it when you are speaking.
7. Consider turning on your camera for better engagement during the meeting.
8. Be prepared to actively participate and contribute to the discussion.

If you encounter any technical difficulties or have any concerns, please reach out to our IT support team as soon as possible. Additionally, if you need any further information or clarification before the meeting, do not hesitate to contact me directly.

The success of this meeting relies on your active participation and cooperation. I look forward to our productive discussions.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
اريد الرد علي هذا الاميل   اخبر الضيف بان استلمنا اميله والقاعه متوفره ومرسل مع الاميل عرض الاسعار للجتماع وللغرف

Dear [Guest's Name],

Thank you for your email. I am pleased to inform you that we have received your email regarding your upcoming event. I am glad to confirm that the desired venue is available for the specified date and time.

Along with this email, please find attached the quotation for the meeting room and accommodation options as per your request. Kindly review the quotation and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or require further information.

We are committed to providing you with a seamless experience, and we look forward to hosting your event. Should you wish to proceed with the booking or require any additional services, please let us know, and we will be more than happy to assist you.

Thank you once again for choosing our venue. We appreciate your business and look forward to working with you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Contact Information]
